action.reasoning: Observation: Best bal_acc=0.6146 (iter17, s1~50ep+mixup, s2~40ep, tau~1.55, val_tau~0.613, few_shot=0.446). Longer s1=80-100ep yields 0.611-0.613; last iter just inspected code (no train). Curves show stage1 ~0.53 val, stage2 lifts to ~0.57. Iter time ~7-8min, 1.69h/10 iters left. Analysis: cRT+Focal+RandAug+pretrained RN50+logit-adj+mixup strong for CIFAR100-LT (IR=100); longer s1 overfits tail slightly. CutMix adds diversity/regularization (esp. useful for LT), p=0.5 mix/cut in s1 should help without extra cost. Set s1=60ep (near-optimal from history), add per-epoch metrics.jsonl logging (loss/val_acc) for curves, keep all else (tau grid 0-3@0.05, nesterov s2, seeds, best-save, weights_only=False). Decision: Provide full cleaned train.py (incremental from current structure: add cutmix fn, random choice p=0.5 in s1 loop, s1=60, metrics logging, proper freeze via named_params, complete loops/CKPT logic); run training then submit_eval immediately (targets >0.62, follows >20ep rule, fits budgets).
